title: PanelAutoMeshByCookieCutLines
description: PanelAutoMeshByCookieCutLines: Divide the panel based on lines in the meshing group.

ExtendCookieCutLines.description: If this item is True, all straight line objects included in the group specified by the Group item are extended to intersect the area object edges for the purpose of meshing the area object.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
